Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format

Class CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers

java.lang.Object
net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Enclosing class:
CocoaSchematicFormat<T extends Schematic>
public static class CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers extends Object
Tag constants for the typed header entries in a CBSC file.

Each constant is a 2-byte (unsigned 16-bit) tag that identifies a header entry type. The tag is written immediately before the entry's payload in the header section.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    AUTHOR
    Optional author string: length-prefixed UTF-8.
    static final int
    AXIS_ORDER
    Axis-order entry: 1 byte axis-order identifier (see AxisOrder.getId()).
    static final int
    BLOCK_DATA_ENCODING
    Block-data encoder identifier: unsigned 16-bit encoder ID.
    static final int
    BLOCK_INFO
    Compression metadata for the block-data body section (CompressionBlockInfo).
    static final int
    BODY_EXTENSION
    Body-extension entry (repeatable): unsigned 64-bit extension ID followed by CompressionBlockInfo metadata for the extension's body section.
    static final int
    INDEX_ENCODING
    Index encoder identifier: unsigned 16-bit encoder ID.
    static final int
    INDEX_INFO
    Compression metadata for the index body section (CompressionBlockInfo).
    static final int
    OFFSET
    Schematic origin offset: three signed 32-bit integers (x, y, z).
    static final int
    PLATFORM
    Minecraft platform entry: four unsigned 32-bit version fields (major, update, minor, protocol) followed by two length-prefixed UTF-8 strings (platform name, platform version).
    static final int
    SIZE
    Schematic dimensions: three unsigned 32-bit integers (width, height, depth).
    static final int
    TIMESTAMP
    Creation timestamp: unsigned 64-bit epoch milliseconds.
    static final int
    TITLE
    Optional title string: length-prefixed UTF-8.
